results.title: Nike, Adidas, Puma and More Athletic Brands Race to Win 2026
Top 25 Nike Competitors & Alternatives: 2026 Market Analysis
Under Armour was a real threat to Nike. Now it's fighting to stay relevant
London Marathon 2026 Results: Sawe, in Adidas, Runs Sub-2-Hour Race
Adidas Competitors: Who are their Biggest Rivals in 2026?

summary: Adidas gaining ground: CEO Bjorn Gulden ahead of schedule on 4-year plan, Terrace shoe trend (Samba/Gazelle) reclaiming lifestyle market, Adidas athlete Sawe ran first legal sub-2hr marathon (world record at 2026 London Marathon) - high-profile marketing win over Nike. Hoka and On Running taking premium performance share. Under Armour restructuring by parting with Steph Curry to save $45-50M, less direct threat to Nike now.
